bucket.description: Used to find the parent resource to bind the IAM policy to

role.description: The role that should be applied. Only one google_storage_bucket_iam_binding can be used per role. Note that custom roles must be of the format [projects|organizations]/{parent-name}/roles/{role-name}.

members.description: An array of identities that will be granted the privilege in the role. Valid values: allUsers, AllAuthenticatedUsers, user:{emailid}, serviceAccount:{emailid}, group:{emailid}, domain:{domain}

condition.type: list(object({expression: string, title: string, description: string}))
condition.description: An IAM Condition for a given binding.
